children.description: Learn how the Dashboard is organized and where to find common translation workflows.

children.nav_title: Guide translations with context and key terms
children.page_title: Guide translations with context and key terms
children.description: Use Context Groups with Glossary (key terms) and Directives (tone and style) to guide AI translation.
Review generated translations, make manual edits, compare locales, and inspect version history in the Dashboard.
Use labels, notes, and comments to coordinate translation review by entry and locale.
Browse Reference pages for the General Translation Dashboard.
Create and manage project and organization API keys for apps, local development, and automation.
Find the public General Translation API endpoints, authentication details, and OpenAPI spec.
Configure webhook endpoints, verify signatures, and handle translation events from General Translation.
Manage organization members, roles, invitations, and default settings.
Understand the default organization roles, permission categories, and how permissions inherit across enterprises, organizations, and projects.
Project settings control how an individual project appears and how its translations are delivered.
Search the locales supported by the General Translation platform.
Learn how to use Locadex, the AI agent which connects your codebase, translations, and content sources. It’s the fastest way to run full stack localization.
Learn how to use Locadex, the AI agent which connects your codebase, translations, and content sources. It’s the fastest way to run full stack localization.
Browse how-to Guides for using the General Translation agent Locadex.
Configure when Locadex runs codegen, translation, and locale update workflows.
Use Locadex within a monorepo by configuring the app root directory and commands
Configure Locadex to merge pull requests automatically when checks pass.
Choose the source locale and target languages Locadex uses for translation workflows.
Add key-value environment variables that Locadex injects into the sandbox when workflows run.
View recent and past Locadex workflow runs from the Agent and History pages.
Browse Reference pages for the General Translation agent Locadex.
Reference for the Locadex Agent page, repository status, languages, and recent workflow runs.
Reference for Locadex general settings, workflows, languages, secrets, and danger zone actions.
Reference for the sandbox environment Locadex uses to run workflows.
Learn how to use the public General Translation API endpoints and the OpenAPI spec.
Learn how to use the public General Translation API endpoints and the OpenAPI spec.
Browse Reference pages for the General Translation API.
Browse OpenAPI Files pages.
Upload one or more source files to a project before queuing translation.
Upload translated files that match previously uploaded source files.
Submit diffs for changed source or translated content instead of uploading full files.
Download multiple translated files in one request.
Download a single translated file for a project, locale, or version.
Mark translated files as published so they are ready for delivery.
Inspect source file metadata, versions, locales, and translation state.
Check translation progress and availability by file and locale.
Move or rename files in a project.
Find translated files that are no longer connected to current source files.
Browse OpenAPI Context pages.
Generate project glossary terms and translation instructions from source files.
Check whether project context is missing, stale, or ready to refresh.
Track the status of a context generation job.
Browse OpenAPI Translation pages.
Translate strings or structured content directly from an application or service.
Queue uploaded source files for background translation.
Browse OpenAPI Jobs pages.
Retrieve status for a queued translation job.
Browse OpenAPI Branches pages.
Inspect branch metadata and project branch state.
Create a branch, or rename and confirm the default branch.
Browse OpenAPI Tags pages.
Create or update a tag on file versions for release tracking.
Browse OpenAPI Project pages.
Read project metadata, settings, and configuration details.
Update project-level settings from automation.
Learn what the `generaltranslation` core library does and when to use it directly.

Install the `generaltranslation` core library, initialize the GT class, and translate your first string.
Browse how-to Guides for using the General Translation Core library.
Learn what locale codes are and how they're used in the General Translation stack.
Translate strings, batches of strings, and structured content directly from code.
Upload a source file, enqueue translation, check status, and download the translated file with the `generaltranslation` library.
Browse Reference pages for the General Translation Core library.
Browse Core GT Class pages.
Initialize a GT instance with API keys, project settings, default locales, and locale mappings. API reference for Constructor.
Update configuration on an existing GT instance. API reference for setConfig.
Browse Core GT Class Methods pages.
Browse Core Translation pages.
Translate one string or structured content entry into a target locale. API reference for translate.
Translate multiple strings or structured content entries in one request. API reference for translateMany.
Upload source files to a project before queueing translation. API reference for uploadSourceFiles.
Upload existing translated files that correspond to source files. API reference for uploadTranslations.
Queue uploaded source files for translation into one or more target locales. API reference for enqueueFiles.
Poll queued translation jobs until they complete, fail, or time out. API reference for awaitJobs.
Check the current status of a translation or setup job. API reference for checkJobStatus.
Check translation status and metadata for uploaded or translated files. API reference for queryFileData.
Retrieve source file metadata and related translation information. API reference for querySourceFile.
Download one translated file after translation is complete. API reference for downloadFile.
Download multiple translated files in one request. API reference for downloadFileBatch.
Prepare uploaded files for project translation workflows. API reference for setupProject.
Read project-level metadata and translation configuration. API reference for getProjectData.
Create a tag for grouping or identifying file versions. API reference for createTag.
Browse Core Formatting pages.
Format numbers, currency, percentages, and numeric values by locale. API reference for formatNum.
Format dates and times by locale. API reference for formatDateTime.
Format relative time values such as minutes ago or days from now. API reference for formatRelativeTime.
Format relative time from a date compared with the current time or another date. API reference for formatRelativeTimeFromDate.
Format ICU-style messages with variables and locale-aware values. API reference for formatMessage.
Format a list into locale-aware parts for custom rendering. API reference for formatListToParts.
Truncate text with locale-aware cutoff characters and terminators. API reference for formatCutoff.
Browse Core Locales pages.
Find the best matching locale from a list of approved locales. API reference for determineLocale.
Return the text direction for a locale. API reference for getLocaleDirection.
Return an emoji marker for a locale or region. API reference for getLocaleEmoji.
Return a human-readable locale name. API reference for getLocaleName.
Return detailed language, script, region, and direction properties for a locale. API reference for getLocaleProperties.
Return region metadata for a locale or region code. API reference for getRegionProperties.
Check whether a value is a valid locale code. API reference for isValidLocale.
Check whether two locales share the same base language. API reference for isSameLanguage.
Check whether two locales represent the same dialect. API reference for isSameDialect.
Check whether one locale can represent another more specific locale. API reference for isSupersetLocale.
Check whether translation is needed between two locales. API reference for requiresTranslation.
Normalize a locale code into a standard format. API reference for standardizeLocale.
Resolve a locale alias to the locale code used by a custom mapping. API reference for resolveAliasLocale.

Browse Core Types pages.
Supported content formats for translation. API reference for Content type.
Custom locale mappings and locale property overrides. API reference for CustomMapping type.
Supported translation data format values. API reference for DataFormat type.
Options for queueing uploaded files for translation. API reference for EnqueueFilesOptions type.
Metadata for adding context to string translation entries. API reference for EntryMetadata type.

Language, script, region, and direction metadata for a locale. API reference for LocaleProperties type.
